title: Theme: Hobbies and Free Time
description: Vocabulary for describing what you do in your leisure hours.

sentences.spanish: Los fines de semana me gusta pintar paisajes.
sentences.english: On weekends I like to paint landscapes.

sentences.spanish: Mi hermano toca la guitarra en una banda de rock.
sentences.english: My brother plays the guitar in a rock band.

sentences.spanish: Nos encanta ir de excursión por las montañas.
sentences.english: We love going hiking through the mountains.

sentences.spanish: Colecciono sellos antiguos de diferentes países.
sentences.english: I collect old stamps from different countries.

sentences.spanish: Leer novelas de ciencia ficción es mi pasatiempo favorito.
sentences.english: Reading science fiction novels is my favorite hobby.

pasatiempo.mnemonic: Pasa (pass) tiempo (time). Something you do to pass the time is a 'hobby'.

tocar.mnemonic: Touch (tocar) the instrument to play it.
